runTitle: Vercel Production QA v8.11.74 - Dashboard AI app shell

environment.backend: Cloud Run not exercised for AI generation

coveredSurfaces: production deployment smoke: /, /validation, /api/version all passed for v8.11.74
/api/version returned version 8.11.74, releaseTag v8.11.74, commit c9117758bf9119b36c149d66dbf09633a5653e2e
GitLab main pipeline 2491196415 success and release tag pipeline 2491196412 success
/dashboard desktop side navigation labels are visible and do not include AI 어시스턴트
/dashboard desktop top-right AI button opens the AI sidebar
/dashboard desktop left navigation collapses to a 64px rail while AI sidebar is open
/dashboard desktop AI sidebar resize handle changed width 960px -> 740px -> 960px
/dashboard desktop AI sidebar fullscreen button routes to /dashboard/ai-assistant
/dashboard/ai-assistant desktop renders embedded AI function page with dialogCount=0
/dashboard/ai-assistant desktop renders AI Chat, Reporter, and Analyst tabs
/dashboard/ai-assistant desktop top-right AI button reopens the sidebar
/dashboard desktop Playwright MCP console error check: 0 errors
/dashboard mobile authenticated header at 390x844 has body/doc scrollWidth 390
/dashboard mobile AI sidebar opens as full viewport dialog with x=0/right=390
/dashboard mobile menu trigger is hidden while AI sidebar is open
/dashboard/ai-assistant mobile renders embedded AI function page with dialogCount=0
/dashboard/ai-assistant mobile renders AI Chat, Reporter, and Analyst tabs
/dashboard/ai-assistant mobile has no horizontal overflow at 390px viewport
skippedSurfaces: AI backend streaming response quality: not required for app-shell/navigation layout regression
Cloud Run admin observability endpoints: out of scope for dashboard AI shell layout QA
core route broad pack beyond production smoke: unchanged by this targeted UI fix

expertAssessments.rationale: Targeted production coverage used Playwright MCP for desktop behavior, Playwright browser automation for mobile layout, local Vitest regression tests, and Vercel smoke/version checks.
Canonical GitLab main and v8.11.74 tag pipelines completed successfully, Vercel deployment is Ready, production smoke passed, and Vercel usage check reported normal billed usage.

The tested app shell matches the target IA: AI is removed from left navigation, opened from the top-right action, desktop sidebar collapses the rail and resizes, and the AI route renders as an embedded dashboard function page on desktop and mobile.

usageChecks.summary: vercel usage checked after production QA; current billing period effective 19.7666 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, no unexpected billed usage reported by CLI.

completedImprovements.title: AI 어시스턴트를 좌측 내비게이션에서 제거하고 상단 우측 CTA로 통합
completedImprovements.evidence: Desktop Playwright MCP navText=개요/서버/알림/로그/토폴로지 and navHasAI=false on Vercel v8.11.74

completedImprovements.title: AI 사이드바 오픈 시 좌측 rail 축소 및 데스크톱 사이드바 리사이즈
completedImprovements.evidence: Desktop Playwright MCP measured aside width 64px and sidebar resize 960px -> 740px -> 960px

completedImprovements.title: AI 전체 페이지 진입 시 사이드바 자동 닫힘 및 상단 버튼 재오픈
completedImprovements.evidence: Desktop Playwright MCP measured /dashboard/ai-assistant dialogCount=0, tabs present, top-right AI button reopened dialogCount=1

completedImprovements.title: 모바일 /dashboard/ai-assistant를 사이드바 handoff가 아닌 대시보드 embedded 기능 페이지로 유지
completedImprovements.evidence: Mobile Playwright measured dialogCount=0, tabs present, and scrollWidth=390 at 390px viewport

notes: QA intentionally focused on dashboard AI app-shell/navigation/layout changes from this release.
No real AI generation was sent during this run to keep production LLM usage within the free-tier guardrails.
